growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: gold.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: patric.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.medium: Defined artificial seawater (ESAW, modified) with P. tricornutum exudates + 13C/15N-labeled algal DOM

up.method: nanoSIMS single-cell 13C net incorporation (Cnet) scaled by cell size and abundance
nanoSIMS single-cell 15N net incorporation (Nnet) scaled by cell size and abundance

growth_records.cite: Mayali et al. Single-cell isotope tracing reveals functional guilds of bacteria associated with the diatom Phaeodactylum tricornutum. Nature Communications (2023). DOI:10.1038/s41467-023-41179-9. [PMC10499878]
growth_records.snippet: Oceanicaulis PT13A ... bacteria Nnet CD 62%, Cnet CD 19%, µg C from DOC 12.9, µg N from DON 6.2 (Table 1)
growth_records.notes: Volumetric net uptake fluxes of complex algal DOC/DON over 24 h from Table 1: DOC 12.9 µg C L-1 d-1, DON 6.2 µg N L-1 d-1. Bacterial abundance 4.39E6 cells/mL (late log). Cnet CD 19%, Nnet CD 62%. Rates are population volumetric net incorporation (not specific mmol/gDW/h); no growth rate reported. Attached to algal cells; phycosphere isolate.
